title: tilia americana f. macrophylla
intro: Tilia americana f. macrophylla, also known as American large-leaved linden, is a variety of the American linden tree (Tilia americana) that is native to eastern North America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic properties, which make it useful in treating anxiety, insomnia, and restlessness. The health benefits of Tilia americana f. macrophylla include reducing stress and promoting relaxation, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of menopausal hot flashes. Herbal preparations of Tilia americana f. macrophylla include tea, tincture, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
